notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Twins challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Austin Martin reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Elly De La Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer singles on a ground ball to left fielder James Outman, deflected by shortstop Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers singles on a fly ball to center fielder Ryan Kreidler. Spencer Steer scores.
